posture.rationale: Global pctile 28.0% and a bottom-half mini-league seat with 9 rounds left: expected rank gain leans toward higher-variance, differentiated picks — favouring lower-ownership riders at comparable EV over mirroring the consensus template.

decision.summary: S13 (Fri 17 Jul, Dole->Belfort 205.8km, HILLY breakaway day, Ballon d'Alsace summit 30km out, NOT a summit finish; window closes 17 Jul 11:30Z) — BLOCK-BOUNDARY RESHAPE 5/8. TRANSITION CLASSIFIED FIRST: just-raced S12 flat -> upcoming S13 hilly = CATEGORY CHANGE, hard floor >=2 discretionary swaps; 5 swaps clears it (block-entry scale, doctrine-correct: the sprint block is spent — next sprint S17 — and no owned rider except Pedersen appears on ANY S13 board). SELLS: Merlier (captain-doubled S12 WIN banked, peak value), Kooij (Axelgaard: speed declining), Kanter, Bittner (crashed S12, sore), Wærenskjold (crashed S12, conf 0). BUYS: POGACAR (CAPTAIN, 20.2M anchor re-buy exactly as leased at S11 — S13 Kalshi top name 7.5%, S14 'tailor-made' chalk, GC 94.5%, capC 61.3k pool #1, ~150k/day passive resumes), Pidcock (only S13 money+book+expert consensus; bridge + weekend climber), Vacek (2nd-consensus, Lidl 2-up with Pedersen), Healy (Axelgaard 4-star, Kalshi-traded, EF break-motivated), Costiou (top roi/M filler). KEEPS: Pedersen (green 357, will hunt intermediates from the break, cyclingstage 4-star — the crossover bridge), Eenkhoorn + Van Asbroeck (ballast). CAPTAIN Pogacar not Pidcock: S13 is a breakaway lottery where nothing clears ~8%, so chalk-captain the weekend engine with the doubled passive floor; captain-differentiation is forbidden. FUNDED at LIVE post-S12-processing prices (verify agent price-joined today's 17:33Z feed): sells 43,187,000 + bank 130,481 vs buys 41,918,000 + 1% fee 419,180 -> bank after ~980,301 (snapshot pool prices were stale 15-Jul values; live sell-side S12 growth exceeds buy-side 7x, direction-safe). LEGAL: exactly 8, captain in team, Lidl-Trek 2-up at legal max, all other teams 1. DNS TRIPLE-CLEAN: pool 174 == 206 market players minus 32 isOut EXACTLY (persons merge dead again — pool-level isOut vacuous, verified structurally); all 13 plan riders price-join-resolved to personIds, all isOut=false in today's 17:33Z feed, zero new out-pids vs yesterday; data/state/owned-dns.json empty (12:35Z); research 2-pass web sweep: all 8 owned finished S12, new abandons Gaviria + Berckmoes (broken collarbone, DNS S13) are UNOWNED and deliberately EXCLUDED from buy candidates despite still sitting in the pool. isOutUnconfirmed empty. Surname trap avoided: the Kalshi-quoted 'Johannessen' is TOBIAS (9.11M), not cheap Anton (2.75M) — neither bought. Adversarial verify: 3 lenses (funding-legality / captain-doctrine / roster-dns-ops) ALL APPROVE, minor only; converge has been skipping since S12 close on 'plan stage 12 != upcoming 13' — this write unblocks tonight's trading with ~15.5h and ~60 ticks to apply atomically. FORWARD: morning run must re-pull Axelgaard's FINAL S13 optakt (lands ~22:00-22:40 tonight, after this brain) and re-validate the Healy/Costiou slots before the 11:30Z lock; Friday evening = S13 hilly -> S14 mountain boundary (floor >=2 more) — rotate bridges (Vacek/Healy proceeds) into the weekend climber tier with CARAPAZ FIRST in the queue (S13+S14+S15 overlap, KOM 3rd) alongside Kuss/Arensman/Martinez on fresh S14 boards; S15 Kalshi shows a thin real Pogacar-wins-Solaison lean (0.71 last, uncalibrated).

swaps.rationale: Anchor re-buy at the boundary, exactly as leased: Merlier exits at peak value having just banked a captain-doubled S12 WIN (3rd of the Tour) with zero forward boards until S17; Pogacar is the S14-15 mountain-weekend chalk (cyclingstage 3-star 'tailor-made' S14), Kalshi GC 94.5%, AND the top-quoted S13 name (7.5%, only genuinely traded market). Yellow+KOM+GC1 passive ~150k/day resumes immediately.

Kooij's speed 'has declined noticeably' (Axelgaard, fresh) and no sprints until S17; Pidcock is the ONLY S13 name where money, bookmaker and experts align (RP 2pt tip 11-1, cyclingstage 4-star, Kalshi 5% traded) — wet/technical Ballon d'Alsace descent 30km out is his signature terrain, GC +11:49 gives freedom, and he's a genuine S14-15 climber (bridge + weekend).

Kanter 7th today but sprint block is spent; Vacek is the quiet second-consensus S13 name (3-star at BOTH cyclinguptodate and cyclingstage, idl favourite, only one-sided Kalshi name with real volume) at just 4.37M, and stacks Lidl-Trek 2-up holdbonus with Pedersen — Lidl tore the race apart for 40km today.

Bittner crashed in the S12 finale ('will be sore, status unclear') and was a boundary sell anyway; Healy is Axelgaard 4-star tier + Kalshi-quoted 3.5% (traded tonight), EF is a named break-motivated team, and he carries real S14-15 break-climber value.

Wærenskjold crashed today, conf 0 with zero forward boards — his S11 win is banked, sell high; Costiou (2.7M) is the substrate's top roi-per-million filler and frees ~3.5M toward the Pogacar re-buy. Filler slot, not core — allowed differentiation.

brainJournal.text: 2026-07-16T19:51:46Z (evening definitive, S13 plan) — **RESHAPED 5/8 (BLOCK BOUNDARY, S12 flat → S13 hilly, category floor ≥2 CLEARED at 5)** S13 Dole→Belfort 205.8km hilly break day (Ballon d'Alsace 30km out, closes 17 Jul 11:30Z). Sprint block exits at peak value after the dream S12 (Merlier CAPTAIN-DOUBLED WIN, Kooij 2nd, Kanter 7th, Pedersen 9th): SOLD Merlier/Kooij (Axelgaard: speed declining)/Kanter/Bittner (crashed, sore)/Wærenskjold (crashed, conf 0). BOUGHT **POGACAR (CAPTAIN — anchor re-buy exactly as leased at S11: S13 Kalshi top name 7.5%, S14 chalk, GC 94.5%, ~150k/day passive resumes)**, Pidcock (ONLY S13 money+book+expert consensus: RP 2pt tip + cyclingstage 4★ + Kalshi 5% traded; bridge+weekend), Vacek (2nd consensus ×3 boards, Lidl 2-up w/ Pedersen), Healy (Axelgaard 4★, Kalshi-traded), Costiou (top roi/M filler). KEPT Pedersen (green 357, intermediate hunter) + Eenkhoorn/Van Asbroeck ballast. Captain chalk-not-differential: S13 lottery (nothing >~8%) → captain the weekend engine. FUNDED at LIVE post-S12 prices (verify agent): sells 43.187M + bank 130,481 vs buys 41.918M + fee 419,180 → bank after ~980k (snapshot pool prices were STALE 15-Jul — S12 processing already applied by 17:33Z feed). DNS triple-clean (pool 174 == 206−32 structurally; persons merge dead AGAIN; owned-dns empty; Gaviria/Berckmoes new abandons unowned + excluded from buys; Johannessen surname trap avoided — Kalshi quote = Tobias not Anton). 3-lens adversarial verify (funding/captain-doctrine/roster-dns-ops) = APPROVE×3 minor. Converge skipped all day on stage mismatch — this write unblocks it, ~60 ticks to close. FORWARD: morning run re-pull Axelgaard FINAL S13 optakt (~22:00, post-brain) + re-validate Healy/Costiou; Fri evening = S14 mtn boundary (≥2 floor) → bridges out, CARAPAZ FIRST + Kuss/Arensman/Martinez on fresh S14 boards. matchRateAtWrite 0.6667.

FROZE — S12 flat (Magny-Cours→Chalon-sur-Saône, bunch sprint), MID-BLOCK / same-type continuation inside the S11-S12 flat block → 0 discretionary swaps. Team already optimal & LIVE-validated on S11: Wærenskjold WON (fastest road stage ever, +470k), Kooij 2nd (+330k), Pedersen 11th (+167k), Merlier 15th (+45k), Kanter 18th (+33k). Captain HELD on Merlier — still flat chalk (bet365 evens vs Kooij 7-2, TV2 5★, cyclingstage top) despite his 15th; doctrine = never differentiate at captain, don't chase today's winner onto the C. DNS triple-clean: snapshot isOut[]/isOutUnconfirmed[] empty + statistik 21:11 all 8 isOut=false/warn=null + 4-agent web sweep (all 8 finished, none on the 10-rider abandon list; only S11 exit = Harper, unowned). Wind 5-11 km/h → no echelon; ~48-65% wet-finale = symmetric crash risk only. Superseded a 20:31 rule-based LLM-down HOLD fallback that raced in (same substance, thinner). matchRate 0.109 (weak substrate) → decided on research + measured growth, not floored EV. Verify: 3 researchers + 1 adversarial refuter, freeze upheld (forced_sells=[]). FORWARD: S13 hilly (Fri) = block boundary → reshape sprint cards out, Pedersen bridges, RE-BUY POGAČAR for S14-15 mtn (guard the still-live p_gc=0 bug that floors his EV 54×).

2026-07-14T19:56:22Z (evening definitive, S11 plan) — **RESHAPED 5/8 (HARD FLIP, S10 mountain → S11-S12 flat block)** S11 Vichy→Nevers 161.3km genuine bunch sprint (last climb 37.9km out, dry, low echelon risk; closes 15 Jul ~11:50Z). ANCHOR-LEASED **Pogačar OUT** (after his S10 Le Lioran WIN + yellow +3:36; re-buy guarded at the S13 boundary, ~4M+ headroom even post-win re-price) + sold Healy/Vacek/Castrillo/Charmig (off-profile ≥2 stages). BOUGHT **Merlier (CAPTAIN — bet365 4-7 ~64%, unanimous #1 ×3 boards, eS 128.8k conf 1.0)**, Kooij (7-2 #2 chalk, dominates winless/fatigue-flagged Philipsen), Wærenskjold (25-1; stale no-re-buy constraint OVERRIDDEN — premise died with the 12-Jul Girmay sale, adjudicated sound by 2 verify lenses; MUST hold through S12 for the fee bar), Eenkhoorn (SQS holdbonus stack w/ Merlier), Dillier (Alpecin filler). KEPT Kanter (16-1, points 5th) + Pedersen (GREEN 268, +25 intermediate today, S13 crossover 0.33) + Barguil (ballast). Funded: sells 37.011M + bank 327,413 → buys 34.666M + fee 346.7k, bank after ~2.326M (direction-safe, pre-S10-processing prices). DNS: watched-riders ALL CLEAR web-verified 3-source (only exit today = Trentin, unowned); pool isOut vacuous (identity merge still dead — chip filed 14-Jul), verified independently. Girmay #3 chalk unfundable alongside Merlier+Kooij in any legal 5-sell shape (verified exhaustively). ULTRACODE: 2 web-research + 3 adversarial verify agents = APPROVE×3 high-conf (1 spelling fix). 20:45 research sweep MISSING tonight (latest.md 09:15) — compensated with live web research; converge had been skipping since 18:36 on "plan stage 10 != upcoming 11" → this write unblocks trading. FORWARD: S12 = FREEZE; Thu evening S13 hilly boundary = Vacek/Healy re-buy candidates, Pogačar re-buy decision (S13 p15 0.47/S14 0.70). matchRateAtWrite 0.0852 (sprint board carries real conf 0.82-1.0).

2026-07-13T23:05:13Z (night pass, third tonight) — **FROZE** (GC-internal soft transition S9 hilly→S10 mountain; freeze ADVERSARIALLY RE-VERIFIED, 0/3 skeptic lenses refuted, all HIGH). S10 Le Lioran (Bastille Day, window closes 11:10Z). Concur with 19:40Z definitive + 21:23Z/22:36Z second opinions — same 8, captain Pogacar (eS 137,406 conf 0.95, RP 4/7 ~64%, pool #1 by 1.76×). OPS: live==plan every full tick through 22:52 local; 00:52 iframe-not-found = known self-recovering transient (4th occurrence); freeze needs no trades. Bank 327,413. Rewrite refreshes the 24h gate through close. Forward: Tue evening = S10→S11 HARD FLIP (full sprint reshape, anchor-lease decision on Pogacar, sprint-chalk captain bought fresh). matchRate 0.6875.

2026-07-13T19:40:19Z (REST-DAY evening definitive) — **FROZE (GC-internal soft transition, freeze RE-EARNED on sharp data)** S10 Aurillac→Le Lioran (Bastille Day 14 Jul; window closes 11:10Z). The promised fresh-odds re-sizing: matchRate 0.165→**0.6875** (RP/bet365 S10 board ingested: Pogacar 4/7 ~64%, Del Toro 9/1, Carapaz 11/1, Vingegaard 18/1) and the 12-Jul freeze SURVIVES on real numbers. 3-agent adversarial verify (swap-search / captain / legality-ops) = **0 refuted, all HIGH**: full-pool scan finds NO funded swap within an order of magnitude of the 1.2×-fee doctrine bar for a 1-day climber hold (best ratios Vingegaard 0.41×, Del Toro 0.25×; only funded 2-swap Charmig+Vacek→Paret-Peintre+fodder nets +12.7k vs 85.3k bar AND strands Vacek's squad-best S13 read p15 0.57). CAPTAIN **Pogacar** held (eS 137,406 conf 0.95 p15 0.822 pool-#1, unanimous 9/9 sources); strategy.md's 24/25-Pedersen-captain WATCH evaluated & not followed (Pedersen best-case doubled marginal ~55-70k < half Pogacar; observation likely stale mid-window snapshot) — confirm/kill vs S10 actual tomorrow. Research deltas: Vacek CORRECTED to GC 24th +16:58 (GC floor dead; pure S13+Lidl hold, top S11-flip rotation candidate); Castrillo identity RESOLVED (pool has exactly one: Pablo, Movistar = ours; researcher's Álvaro warning was the confusion); Kalshi TLS-blocked tonight (RP corroborates, no signal lost). Sprinters held (single-island rule; Pedersen GREEN 268 +45, Kanter points 5th). 0 isOut/unconf pool-wide; no new abandons; Healy heat = soft watch. Rewrite was MANDATORY (prior plan crossed the 24h gate ~23:21 CEST tonight). Live==plan verified through 21:36 CEST. Bank 327,413. Forward: Tue evening = S10→S11 HARD FLIP (full sprint reshape, anchor-lease Pogacar decision, captain = sprint chalk bought fresh). matchRate 0.6875

Concur w/ 19:42Z evening definitive — EARNED FREEZE for a GC-INTERNAL SOFT transition (S9 hilly->S10 mountain, doctrine 1-5; GC core Pogacar fits, squad 6/8 on-profile -> captain-to-chalk + 0 discretionary swaps is IN-class, NOT an under-rotated boundary; the real hard flip is S10->S11 flat block, Tue-night's call). CAPTAIN Pedersen→**POGACAR**: Kalshi 64% runaway (only liquid price, direct browser read), Axelgaard 5★ + cyclingstage top tier, substrate eS 185,259/capC 185,509/conf 1.00 pool-#1; floor (yellow+KOM+GC1 ~150k passive, doubled) > every owned alternative's ceiling even in the ~40-50% break scenario. ROSTER HELD 8/8: S9 hilly→S10 mountain = GC-internal soft (~0-2) and 6/8 already on-profile; 3-agent adversarial verify (roster/captain/ops) returned 0 refuted, all HIGH-conf — funding wall (bank 74,042; Johannessen/Martinez/Seixas unfundable by 1.1-2.8M from any legal sell combo), the only fundable move (Vacek+Barguil→Simmons+filler) nets ~−46k after fees on a single conf-0.365 source AND strands Vacek's squad-best S13 read (p15 0.57), and waiting is FREE (rest day: Racing Post 2026 S10 + fresh Axelgaard optakt + filled Kalshi board all land Mon → tomorrow's evening run re-sizes on sharper data, window still open). 2026-07-12T10:14:04Z (midday, S9 race day) — **CHANGED** S9 Malemort→Ussel hilly break day (window closes 11:35Z; plan written ~10:14Z, 4 trade-capable converge ticks left). ONE SWAP **Girmay → Mads Pedersen** (10.686M) on material overnight news: first live stage market (Kalshi, thin) has Pedersen co-fav with our Vacek (37/39%), Axelgaard repub 5★ Pedersen, ctc 3★; substrate eS 70.3k conf 0.86 pool-#1. 3-agent adversarial verify APPROVE×3 (high). Skeptic CORRECTED my naive +68k math to honest **+~24k decision-weighted [band −11k,+70k]**: +54k S9 (vs steelmanned Girmay ~16k, not floored 1.9k) +24k Lidl 2-up holdbonus (gated OFF in ev.js, real in game) +70k green-jersey carry (Pedersen holds green, 25k/stage) +3k etapebonus **−74k REAL S11-12 sprint downgrade** (Girmay ≈2× Pedersen forward sprint reads — my "keeps sprint slot covered" claim was WRONG) −53.4k half-fee. Negative (−29k) under the plain 1% fee → pure owner-calibration trade (near-zero→swap, 2026-07-10 directive). Girmay = the unique single sell that funds it. Funded to the kroner (bank after 74,042; fee-on-buy-only EMPIRICALLY confirmed from the 8-Jul live trade). CAPTAIN HELD **Vacek** (auditor: mean-equivalent vs captain-Pedersen, ALL tiebreakers → Vacek: fatter tail in the ~75% break scenario, 0% top-team captained differential, chaser 26.2 pctile; capC metric is a MEAN missing his p_gc GC-jump tail; do NOT roll back captain if the swap misses the window). Researcher's lean-HOLD rested on stale ~270k bank (actual 2.09M). 0 isOut/unconf pool-wide. Ops: Mac provably slept 07:00–09:56Z (tick gap) → started self-expiring caffeinate (90 min) so converge ticks survive to close; NO executor run (converge owns application). CONSTRAINTS forward: no Pedersen→Girmay round-trip at S11 absent fresh info; no Wærenskjold re-buy; tomorrow rest day → evening run plans S10 Le Lioran (bank thin 74k, upgrades must self-fund via sells).

2026-07-11T21:23:55Z (evening second-opinion) — **HELD** S9 Malemort→Ussel hilly BREAK day (heat-shortened ~155.5km, window OPEN, closes 12 Jul 11:35Z). Live team already = tonight's evening plan (converge applied it: Wærenskjold→Castrillo done, captain Kanter→**Vacek** done). Ran an independent adversarial search + priced 4 concrete moves, ALL fail net-EV: (1) buy VdP for ceiling (cap 69k, only worthy ceiling-add) — forces selling Girmay/Kanter sprint core needed S11-12 + ~108k fee + break lottery → fee-negative over block; (2) Barguil→Simmons — redundant 5th break card (already at breadth frontier expected_breadth 4.1, 4 corroborated break cards) AND sacrifices S10 summit/S14-15 mountain cover; (3) Charmig→Simmons — the e_h gap (43k vs 7k) is a HORIZON-MULTIPLIER ARTIFACT: S10-12 fusedByStage are identical floors (p15 0.02) so incremental EV = S9 stage only (+20.8k) < half-fee 24k → NEGATIVE even on the owner half-fee dial; (4) Charmig/Barguil→Alaphilippe (cap 42.6k) — single-channel csFav conf 0.39, absent from all 4 S9 star boards + the sharp stars channel (spearman 0.64) → uncorroborated noise, reject on adversarial-verify discipline. CAPTAIN re-audited & CONCUR Vacek: posture CONFIRMED chaser (global pctile 26.2%, mini 6/6, worsening, 14 rounds left → variance correctly rewarded). Pogačar = better PURE-MEAN (~+110-130k/day passive yellow+KOM+GC1 doubled, low-variance) but Vacek = 3★×3 + cyclinguptodate OUTRIGHT-WINNER + GC10 break→GC-jump double-EV tail, robust on the sharpest channel, 0% top-team captained = differential. findings.detail: Captain miss on 32% of stages (avg 27024 kr left; worst: flat (avg regret 42619)). Tighten captain selection on flat stages.

improve.mergeGateExplanation: Held (not merged): the conjunctive gate (in-sample ≥ MIN AND held-out ≥ MIN AND no fold regresses) was not met — held-out is -0.23% (must be positive / above floor); at least one cross-val fold regressed; no change proposed.

strategy.essence: Maximise total team VALUE GROWTH (kr) over the whole Tour. Strategy is EV TENDENCIES, not hard rules/quotas: build the squad by maximising Σ e_horizon under the constraints (8 riders, 50M budget, max 2 per real team, 1 captain), use roi_per_million to fill cheap breadth slots, tilt toward p_top15 breadth and lower ownership among near-equal e_horizon, and captain the owned rider with the highest captain_ceiling. GOLD = unlimited swaps; the only friction is the 1% buy fee, so only swap when the multi-stage gain beats it. Confidence governs aggression — discount low-confidence riders.
tendencies: Maximise Σ e_horizon under the hard constraints; do not churn for sub-1%-fee gains.
Use roi_per_million to fill cheap breadth slots so under-priced value is not overlooked.
Among near-equal e_horizon, tilt toward p_top15 breadth and lower ownership.
Captain the owned rider with the highest captain_ceiling (right-tail upside).
Concentrate variance/captaincy where stage leverage is high; prefer breadth on low-confidence stages.
Discount enriched.lowConfidence riders and fused.confidence < 0.4; matchRate governs how much to trust EV.
Respect profile_block / block_boundary look-ahead: do not dump a rider wanted again 1–3 stages later.
On TTT, stage-placement/holdbonus/etapebonus do not apply — value whole strong TT squads.

glossary.definition: Expected value in kr from THIS stage for a rider — Σ over placement, GC, jersey, sprint/KOM, TTT terms, minus hazard. Same kr axis the backtest scores.
Multi-stage expectation: e_stage plus discounted, hold-weighted look-ahead over the next 1–3 stages, net of the amortized 1% buy fee. The primary team-build objective.
e_horizon (net of amortized fee) per 1M kr of price — the efficiency metric for filling cheap breadth slots. Infinity if value is 0 with positive EV.
High/med/low tercile bucket of roi_per_million across the live (non-DNS) field — a quick-read value tag.
E[max(0, Δkr)] right-tail if this rider is captained this stage — the win windfall + placement upside + positive passive floor. Captain the owned rider with the highest one.
Fused stage-win probability (de-vigged odds + star/UCI/feltet signals via a weighted geometric pool), normalised so the board ~sums to 1.
Fused probability of finishing in the stage top-15 (p_stage expanded by a per-stage-type exponent). Drives etapebonus breadth.
Fused GC-strength: de-vigged GC win odds blended with a capped UCI-points prior. Paid every held stage as passive GC income.
HONEST 0–1 trust band = coverage × agreement (NOT a statistical interval). Below 0.4 the rider is flagged low-confidence; discount aggression.
Count of independent research channels that had a reading for this rider (0–5). More channels = sturdier fusion.
Fraction of the pool a LIVE source actually covered. Low pre-race (only GC odds live); rises ~24h out. Low matchRate = treat EV as weak.
Per-stage 0–1 decisive-stage weight (GC importance, volatility, summit, TT). Concentrate variance/captaincy where it is high.
Expected count of an optimal 8-man team’s riders inside the stage top-15. High on bunch days, low on selective mountain/TT days.
Grouping of consecutive similar stages + whether this stage closes the block — the 1–3 stage anti-churn look-ahead.
Holdbonus = real-team stage-finish spillover to all that team’s active riders. On TTT, stage-placement/holdbonus/late-arrival/etapebonus do NOT apply — value whole strong TT squads.
True when the dashboard successfully re-ran the pure fusion+EV engine to reconstruct per-rider numbers; false means it fell back to the snapshot name-lists.
